__fixture__.name: build_output_very_large_open_detail
__fixture__.scenario: A build job produced a very large combined output stream whose inline render would freeze the host shell. The viewer promotes to an open-in-detail panel, keeps the size bucket, byte count, and line count visible on the host surface, and delegates live delivery to the referenced live-set record. The client owns a tail truncation for the inline summary; the detail panel serves the full loaded window on demand.
contract_sections: Size disclosure remains visible in open_detail
Client-owned tail truncation for inline summary

trust_posture.trust_label: Raw build output; no active content present.

freshness.disclosed_label: Live build output; the inline summary is promoted to a detail panel so the shell stays responsive.

size_disclosure.disclosed_label: Very large build output (~90 MB, 612,400 lines). Inline summary shows the last 2,000 lines; full body is one click away.

truncation.summary_label: Inline summary shows the last 2,000 lines; the detail panel serves the full loaded body.

search.scope_label: Search from the detail panel scans the full loaded build output.

jump_to_latest.action_label: Jump to latest in detail panel

large_output_disclosure.disclosed_label: Open in detail to review the full body without freezing the shell; export covers the loaded materialized build output.

review_summary_label: Very large build output promoted to open_detail to keep the host shell responsive; size disclosure stays visible inline.
